message:
test: add @logic_table end-to-end integration tests

Add comprehensive test suite for LogicTable protocol:
- LogicTableContext column binding and retrieval
- Batch vector operations (cosine similarity, L2 distance, dot product)
- Simulated metal0-compiled @logic_table class execution
- Performance benchmark with synthetic 384-dim vectors (~2100 docs/ms)

New test target: zig build test-logic-table
